purpose: A container that arranges form fields and labels in a responsive grid. Supports edit and display modes with consistent spacing.
whenToUse: For creating, editing, or displaying structured data
whenNotToUse: For single-field input — use field component directly
For freeform layout — use FlexBox or VBox
doRules: Group related fields under a FormContainer with title
Use SimpleForm for basic forms; Form for complex layouts
dontRules: Do not skip Labels on fields
Do not put unrelated fields in same group
Do not stretch the form to full width on wide viewports

layoutGuidance.sizing: Max width 1024px preferred; width fills parent up to max.
layoutGuidance.alignment: Labels left, fields right (or labels above on narrow).

responsiveBehavior.S: Single column with labels above fields

accessibilityGuidance.requirement: Tab navigates through fields in DOM order
Every form field paired with Label
Required fields announced; errors announced via valueState

exceptions: SimpleForm has a different child API but same visual output
